title: wp-test-env configuration
description: Project-level configuration for the wp-test-env multi-version WordPress test environment. Place at the repo root as wp-test-env.yml or .wp-test-env.yml.

plugins.description: Paths to bind-mount into every WP container at /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/<basename>. Absolute or relative to the repo root.

matrix.description: Subset of PHP × WordPress combinations to provision. When set, generate-compose.sh and all iteration scripts restrict to these pairs. Omit to use the full matrix.

woocommerce.description: When false, skip WooCommerce install and sample data seeding during init.

post-init.description: Path to a shell script executed at the end of init.sh. Relative paths resolve against the repo root. Receives two args: $1=php filter, $2=wp filter (empty when targeting all).
